name: GH_Canvas
summary: The GH_Canvas is the control that handles all mouse and paint events for a single loaded document.

constructors.name: GH_Canvas
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_Canvas class

methods.name: AddTagArtist
methods.summary: Add a Tag Artist instance to this canvas.

methods.name: AddValidator
methods.summary: Add a new drop validator to the canvas.

methods.name: CreateMRUPanels
methods.summary: Create new MRU panels. This function only does something if there is no document loaded in the canvas.

methods.name: CreatePreview
methods.summary: Render this canvas to a thumbnail preview.

methods.name: DestroyMRUPanels
methods.summary: Destroy any MRU panels that might be in existence.

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the GH_Canvas and optionally releases the managed resources

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: GenerateHiResImage
methods.signature: public List<string> GenerateHiResImage(Rectangle rec, GH_Canvas.GH_ImageSettings settings, out Size totalSize)
methods.summary: Generate a collection of hi-res images of the document.

returns.doc: List of file paths that indicate the individual images.

methods.name: GenerateHiResImageTile
methods.signature: public Bitmap GenerateHiResImageTile(GH_Viewport vp, Color bg)
methods.summary: Generate a single tile in a Hi-Res image export.

methods.name: GetCanvasScreenBuffer
methods.summary: Get a bitmap that resembles the current state of the canvas.

params.name: modeOverride
params.doc: The mode to apply during the off-screen rendering.

returns.doc: A Format24bppRgb bitmap similar to the current canvas display.

methods.name: GetGraphicsObject
methods.summary: Gets a graphics object for this control. You are not allowed to draw with this object, use it only for visibility testing and such. If you're inside a canvas update, use the Graphics() property instead. You must dispose of the Graphics object returned by this method or resources will be leaked.

params.name: setupDisplayTransform
params.doc: If true, the display transform will be added to the graphics object.

returns.doc: A non-drawing Graphics object on success or null on failure..

methods.name: HideMRUPanels
methods.summary: Hide all existing MRU panels by sliding them out of view.

methods.name: InstantiateNewObject(Guid, PointF, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool InstantiateNewObject(Guid id, PointF at, bool update)

methods.name: InstantiateNewObject(Guid, String, PointF, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool InstantiateNewObject(Guid id, string init_code, PointF at, bool update)

methods.name: Navigate
methods.summary: Perform a single navigation step.

methods.name: OnPaint
methods.summary: (Overrides Control.OnPaint(PaintEventArgs).)

methods.name: OnPaintBackground
methods.summary: (Overrides Control.OnPaintBackground(PaintEventArgs).)

methods.name: OnViewportChanged
methods.summary: Ensure the canvas and document viewport data are synchronised and raises the ViewportChanged event.

methods.name: Regen
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method is obsolete, use Refresh() instead. Or better yet, use Invalidate().")] public void Regen()
methods.summary: Obsolete.

methods.name: RemoveAllTagArtists
methods.summary: Remove all IGH_TagArtists from this canvas. Do not use this method unless you want to screw over everyone else.

methods.name: RemoveTagArtist(Guid)
methods.summary: Remove all IGH_TagArtists from this canvas that match a certain ID.

returns.doc: The number of IGH_TagArtist instances removed.

methods.name: RemoveTagArtist(IGH_TagArtist)
methods.summary: Remove a specific tag artist from this canvas. If the instance occurs multiple times in the TagArtist list, all instances will be removed.

returns.doc: The number of IGH_TagArtist instances removed.

methods.name: RemoveValidator
methods.summary: Remove a drop validator from the canvas.

methods.name: ScheduleRegen
methods.summary: Schedule a regen to occur after the specified number of milliseconds have elapsed. If a Regen is called in this time frame, the schedule will be cleared. Only a single schedule can be active at any time, so any call to ScheduleRegen will clear existing schedules.

params.name: delay
params.doc: Number of milliseconds to wait until repainting the canvas. intervals equal to or less than zero will be ignored.

methods.name: SetSmartTextRenderingHint
methods.summary: When this method is called during a redraw, the TextRenderingHint of the associated graphics object will be set to either GH_CrispText or GH_SmoothText depending on zoom level.

methods.name: ShowComponentSearchBox()
methods.summary: Display the component Search dialog at the current mouse location. The dialog cannot be shown if ModifiersEnabled=False.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ShowComponentSearchBox(Point)
methods.summary: Display the component Search dialog at the given coordinate. The dialog cannot be shown if ModifiersEnabled=False.

params.name: at
params.doc: Location (in screen space) for the center of the search box.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ShowMRUPanels
methods.summary: Show any hidden MRU panels by sliding them back into view.

methods.name: ShowNavigationPane
methods.summary: Displays the quick-navigation popup pane at the cursor.

methods.name: ShowSearchDialog
methods.summary: Display the Find dialog. If a Find dialog is already active for this canvas, nothing will happen.

params.name: centerOnCursor
params.doc: If true, the dialog will be centered on the cursor, otherwise it will be put in the upper left corner of the canvas.

methods.name: StartAutoPan
methods.summary: Start the auto-panning timer.

methods.name: StopAutoPan
methods.summary: Stop the auto-panning timer.

methods.name: UpdateDocumentPreview
methods.summary: Call this method to update the preview thumbnail for the currently loaded document. If no document is currently loaded, nothing will happen.

properties.name: ActiveInteraction
properties.summary: Gets or sets the currently active interaction object.

properties.name: ActiveObject
properties.summary: Gets or sets the currently active object.

properties.name: ActiveWidget
properties.summary: Gets or sets the currently active widget.

properties.name: CursorCanvasPosition
properties.summary: Gets the location of the cursor in Canvas coordinates.

properties.name: CursorControlPosition
properties.summary: Gets the location of the cursor in Control coordinates.

properties.name: DisplayVoronoiWarning
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the Voronoi Over-dose warning message is displayed. This property is set once at Grasshopper startup to True.

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: Gets or sets the document currently loaded in this canvas.

properties.name: DrawingMode
properties.summary: Gets the current drawing mode for this canvas.

properties.name: Graphics
properties.summary: Gets the graphics object with which this Canvas is redrawn. This object only exists during redraws, if you need the Graphics object for this canvas outside of updates, call GetGraphicsObject() instead.

properties.name: HasControlWithFocus
properties.summary: Gets whether or not this canvas has a child control on it with focus.

properties.name: IsActiveInteraction
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not there is an interaction object loaded in this canvas.

properties.name: IsActiveObject
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not an object is currently activated.

properties.name: IsActiveWidget
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not a widget is currently activated.

properties.name: IsDocument
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not a document is currently loaded in this canvas.

properties.name: ModifiersEnabled
properties.summary: Gets or sets the modifiers enabled flag. When modifiers are disabled, only zooming and panning is still allowed.

properties.name: NavigationPanDown
properties.summary: Gets or sets the special key for panning down.

properties.name: NavigationPanLeft
properties.summary: Gets or sets the special key for panning left.

properties.name: NavigationPanPixels
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of pixels for each pan operation.

properties.name: NavigationPanRight
properties.summary: Gets or sets the special key for panning right.

properties.name: NavigationPanUp
properties.summary: Gets or sets the special key for panning up.

properties.name: NavigationZoomFactor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the zoom factor for navigation zoom operations.

properties.name: NavigationZoomIn
properties.summary: Gets or sets the special key for zooming in.

properties.name: NavigationZoomOut
properties.summary: Gets or sets the special key for zooming in.

properties.name: Painter
properties.summary: Gets the painter object that handles most of the drawing logic for this canvas.

properties.name: Painting
properties.summary: Gets whether this canvas is currently busy painting itself.

properties.name: TagArtistIDs
properties.summary: Gets all the TagArtist IDs in this Canvas.

properties.name: ThumbnailSize
properties.summary: Gets the thumbnail size for documents.

properties.name: TooltipDelay
properties.summary: Gets the delay (in milliseconds) required for a tooltip popup. This delay is a user setting stored under the Canvas:TooltipDelay field of the core settings.

properties.name: Validator
properties.summary: Provides access to all the validators associated with this canvas.

properties.name: ValidGraphics
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Valid Graphics flag. Even if the flag is set to true, though, the property may still return false if there is a problem with the internal graphics object.

properties.name: Viewport
properties.summary: Gets the viewport that determines the panning and zooming for this canvas.

properties.name: Widgets
properties.summary: Gets a list of all the widgets on this canvas.

properties.name: ZoomFadeHigh
properties.summary: Gets the ZUI fade alpha value for the high zoom level threshold. This static field gets set on every Canvas paint start. The high threshold is typically used for ZUI elements that only appear when zoomed in.

properties.name: ZoomFadeLow
properties.summary: Gets the ZUI fade alpha value for the low zoom level threshold. This static field gets set on every Canvas paint start. The low threshold is typically used for fading of icons and object names.

properties.name: ZoomFadeMedium
properties.summary: Gets the ZUI fade alpha value for the medium zoom level threshold. This static field gets set on every Canvas paint start. The medium threshold is typically used for non-informative UI elements such as highlights.

properties.name: ScheduleInactive
properties.summary: Defines the delay used to indicate the absence of a schedule.

events.name: CanvasPaintBackground
events.summary: Raised after the background has been drawn.

events.name: CanvasPaintBegin
events.summary: Raised before a new paint operation starts. This event is always raised, even if the Canvas isn't visible.

events.name: CanvasPaintEnd
events.summary: Raised after a paint operation completes. This event is always raised, even if the Canvas isn't visible.

events.name: CanvasPostPaintOverlay
events.summary: Raised after object overlay drawing completes.

events.name: CanvasPostPaintWidgets
events.summary: Raised after widgets are drawn. This is the final event in the Drawing pipeline.

events.name: CanvasPrePaintOverlay
events.summary: Raised before object overlay drawing starts.

events.name: DocumentChanged
events.summary: This event is raised whenever a different document is loaded into this canvas.

events.name: DocumentObjectMouseDown
events.summary: This event is raised whenever the left mouse button is pressed while over a Document object.

events.name: ModifiersChanged
events.summary: This event is raised whenever the ModifiersEnabled property changes.

events.name: NavigationSettingsChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever any of the shared navigation properties changed.

events.name: ViewportChanged
events.summary: This event is raised whenever the viewport properties are modified, for example when the pan or zoom values are affected.

events.name: WidgetListCreated
events.summary: This event is raised once for every GH_Canvas object that is created anew. The event is Shared (static) because it is raised inside the constructor of a GH_Canvas object and therefor cannot be registered on an instance.
